Kefer Astrology repository documentation

Primary entrypoints:
- /llm/project-context/
- /llm/continuation-guide/
- /docs/
- /docs/frontend-react/
- /docs/architecture/

Notes:
- The docs site is generated from the repository docs/ directory with Hugo.
- Frontend builds are copied into /apps/<workspace>/ during npm run docs:prepare.
- Generated frontend copies under docs/static/apps/ are build artifacts, not source of truth.
